file_name: HMA MAAS - Questionnaire re - Remedy Offer (29 June 2026)_0.pdf

questions.text: Describe the extent to which HMA’s remedy offer would address any concerns you have in relation to the Acquisition.
Provide your views whether the proposed divestitures are likely to attract a suitable purchaser, and the qualities a suitable purchaser should possess.
Provide your views on whether Corbet’s Group is a suitable purchaser of the HMA Blackwater RMX plant and the HMA Yalkara hard rock quarry.
Provide your view on any factors that may impact effective implementation of the remedy offer e.g., any third-party consents (including regulatory) required.
Provide any additional information or comments you consider relevant to the ACCC’s consideration of the remedy offer.

all_questionnaires.file_name: Heidelberg Materials Australia – construction materials business of MAAS - Questionnaire_0.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any quarries (fine or coarse aggregates), RMX plants, asphalt plants or waste disposal and recycling facilities you operate, the type of products you supply and/or purchase, the area(s) you service, and any commercial relationships you have with HMA or MAAS.
